design_plan: Python RNG Execution: seed = hash('Order food with AI|use_case|people who want an AI assistant to order meals, groceries, and delivery without babysitting apps|2026-07-06T18:28:51.226093+00:00') -> selection locked. AIDA Check: Attention(hero), Interest(market context + proof), Desire(workflow + cache), Action(CTA). Font Selection: Cabinet Grotesk. Hero Math Verification: clamp headline 42–72px, max-width 1120px ensures 2–3 lines. Bento Density Verification: grid-auto-flow: dense present. GSAP Motion Selection: image-scale-fade-scroll + hover-physics guarded. Label Sweep & Button Check: primary black pill CTA, secondary white CTA verified.
headline: Order food with AI — a personal agent that actually places the order

site_brief.audience: people who want an AI assistant to order meals, groceries, and delivery without babysitting apps
site_brief.goal: Create an indexable SEO use-case page in the /use-cases/ cluster. Target the practical query 'Order food with AI', show the exact job-to-be-done, and explain how Super can perform the workflow with real computer use and a reusable computer-use cache. Include sibling use-case links so the cluster feels intentional, crawlable, and useful. Add a long-form operator playbook with how-to steps, setup checklist, realistic limits, confirmation moments, and examples that a reader can act on immediately.
queries: computer use AI agent ordering food
site_brief.title: Order food with AI
site_brief.use_case_intent: show how Super can coordinate food ordering across delivery apps, preferences, addresses, payment confirmation, and repeat orders

summary: This use-case page shows how Super can act as a personal AI agent to order meals, groceries, and delivery across real apps without babysitting screens. It explains the workflow, confirmation points, safety limits, and why Super’s computer-use cache makes repeated food orders faster and cheaper over time.
